title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers; fetch-based with full TypeScript definitions.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, RAG, admin panel); runs in Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby blocks.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform TUI (Rust) for chatting with Ollama models from the terminal with syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with 30+ recipes: function-calling, vision, PDF RAG, fine-tune adapters, etc.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on Linux/macOS with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service + model cache inside CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-rag-qa
summary: Minimal Streamlit app showing retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete, summarization, and note Q&A via Ollama.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama server pre-installed.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Go service that bridges Ollama to Slack with support for threads, reactions, and model selection.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate for Ollama using reqwest and serde with full streaming support.
